basic_details.job_title: Anna University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Scientist, Project Technician and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Staff Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Anna University. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the Anna University Project Staff Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. Avionics / Aerospace/ Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation / Communication engineering, M.E/MS (Engg) Avionics / Aerospace/ Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation / Communication engineering, Any degree with 20+ years of experience in Indian Air Force, M.E. / M.Tech / M.Sc in Aerospace / Aeronautical / Avionics / Electronics & Communication / Computer Science / Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation, BE in Aerospace / Aeronautical / Avionics / Electronics & Communication / Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation, Any Diploma/Degree with minimum 2 years' Drone experience
qualification.details: Project Scientist: Ph.D. Avionics / Aerospace/ Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation / Communication engineering / Equivalent with 5+ Years' Experience in the Drone Industry OR M.E/MS (Engg) Avionics / Aerospace/ Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation / Communication engineering / Equivalent with 10+ Years' Experience in the Drone Industry OR Any degree with 20+ years of experience in Indian Air Force. Essential: Excellent knowledge in Aviation safety, RF equipment, and co-ordination with ATC. Experience with respect to Airspace Management, Flight Safety etc. Technical Management and Networking capability. Must be a holder of Private Pilot License. Leadership quality and wide knowledge in respect of DGCA UAS Rules and Regulations. Experience in BVLOS UAV/SWARM UAV operations. Must be a DGCA Remote Pilot Instructor (Small & Medium). Familiarity with Drone Rules 2021, UAS classifications, and DGCA operational requirements. Project Associate II (BVLOS Flight Operations & Field Testing Engineer): M.E. / M.Tech / M.Sc in Aerospace / Aeronautical / Avionics / Electronics & Communication / Computer Science / Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation / Equivalent degree with 5+ years' experience in the field of UAV OR BE in Aerospace / Aeronautical / Avionics / Electronics & Communication / Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation / Equivalent with 8+ years' experience in the field of UAV. Essential: Strong understanding of UAV systems, sensors, flight controllers, and communication links. Hands-on experience in field testing, flight trials, and test data collection. Ability to assist in BVLOS trial planning, range setup, safety procedures, and field coordination. Familiarity with Drone Rules 2021, UAS classifications, and DGCA operational requirements. Good skills in documentation, logs, checklists, and test reporting. Capable of working in outdoor, time-sensitive, and multi-agency environments. Experience with BVLOS or long-range UAV operations, GCS handling, telemetry, or RF systems. Exposure to risk assessment, safety management, or regulatory compliance activities. Must be a DGCA Remote Pilot Instructor (Small / Medium). Project Technician: Any Diploma/Degree with minimum 2 years' Drone experience. Essential: Basic knowledge of drone components, wiring, and assembly procedures. Knowledge of composite fabrication processes, including hand lay-up, vacuum bagging, resin infusion, and curing techniques. UAV Payload Integration and Testing. Experience in handling of Ground test equipment's.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Project Associate II (BVLOS Flight Operations & Field Testing Engineer)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Project Associate II (BVLOS Flight Operations & Field Testing Engineer)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.annauniv.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Anna University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: Anna University Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Scientist: Ph.D. Avionics / Aerospace/ Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation / Communication engineering / Equivalent with 5+ Years' Experience in the Drone Industry OR M.E/MS (Engg) Avionics / Aerospace/ Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation / Communication engineering / Equivalent with 10+ Years' Experience in the Drone Industry OR Any degree with 20+ years of experience in Indian Air Force. Essential: Excellent knowledge in Aviation safety, RF equipment, and co-ordination with ATC. Experience with respect to Airspace Management, Flight Safety etc. Technical Management and Networking capability. Must be a holder of Private Pilot License. Leadership quality and wide knowledge in respect of DGCA UAS Rules and Regulations. Experience in BVLOS UAV/SWARM UAV operations. Must be a DGCA Remote Pilot Instructor (Small & Medium). Familiarity with Drone Rules 2021, UAS classifications, and DGCA operational requirements. Project Associate II (BVLOS Flight Operations & Field Testing Engineer): M.E. / M.Tech / M.Sc in Aerospace / Aeronautical / Avionics / Electronics & Communication / Computer Science / Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation / Equivalent degree with 5+ years' experience in the field of UAV OR BE in Aerospace / Aeronautical / Avionics / Electronics & Communication / Electrical & Electronics / Instrumentation / Equivalent with 8+ years' experience in the field of UAV. Essential: Strong understanding of UAV systems, sensors, flight controllers, and communication links. Hands-on experience in field testing, flight trials, and test data collection. Ability to assist in BVLOS trial planning, range setup, safety procedures, and field coordination. Familiarity with Drone Rules 2021, UAS classifications, and DGCA operational requirements. Good skills in documentation, logs, checklists, and test reporting. Capable of working in outdoor, time-sensitive, and multi-agency environments. Experience with BVLOS or long-range UAV operations, GCS handling, telemetry, or RF systems. Exposure to risk assessment, safety management, or regulatory compliance activities. Must be a DGCA Remote Pilot Instructor (Small / Medium). Project Technician: Any Diploma/Degree with minimum 2 years' Drone experience. Essential: Basic knowledge of drone components, wiring, and assembly procedures. Knowledge of composite fabrication processes, including hand lay-up, vacuum bagging, resin infusion, and curing techniques. UAV Payload Integration and Testing. Experience in handling of Ground test equipment's.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.annauniv.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Anna University Project Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for Anna University Project Staff Recruitment 2026 is 20th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff posts at Anna University?
faq.answer: Anna University is recruiting for a total of 4 Project Staff posts. These vacancies are distributed among different roles such as Project Scientist, Project Associate II, and Project Technician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Anna University Project Staff Recruitment 2026 is offline. Interested candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Staff positions at Anna University varies depending on the post. It ranges from Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 per month, with specific ranges for Project Scientist, Project Associate II, and Project Technician.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Staff posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary for each post. They range from a Diploma/Degree with drone experience for Project Technician to Ph.D. or M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc with significant experience for Project Scientist and Project Associate II.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for Anna University Project Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Anna University Project Staff Recruitment 2026, as per the available information.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Staff posts at Anna University will involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Anna University, which is https://www.annauniv.edu. Links are also provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Project Staff at Anna University are on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Which state and city is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Anna University located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The pincode for the university is 600044.
